quality.rationale: 利用球对称性与Killing矢量不变量构造，逻辑链条完整且具有天体运动背景

origin.question:
Problem 15.1. Prove that the total angular momentum squared
$$
\mathbf {L}^{2} = \mathbf {p}_{	heta}^{2} + \sin^{- 2} 	heta \mathbf {p}_{\phi}^{2}
$$
is a constant of motion along any Schwarzschild geodesic.
origin.answer: Thus $\mathbf{L}^2$ is a constant of motion in general, q.e.d.
origin.solution:
Solution 15.1. When the particle moves in the equatorial plane, we have $L^2 = p_\phi^2$ , which is obviously a conserved constant since $p_\phi$ itself is. ( $\pmb{\xi} = \partial/\partial \pmb{\phi}$ is a Killing vector so $\pmb{\xi} \cdot \mathbf{p}$ is conserved; see Problem 10.10.) But by spherical symmetry the motion is always in the equatorial plane of some rotated coordinate system. If we could write this $p_\phi^2$ as an invariant quantity (under rotations) and then evaluated the invariant in the original system, we would be done.
At some instant when the particle is at radius $r$ the covariant 4-velocity $	ilde{\mathbf{p}}$ has components $(\mathfrak{p}_t, \mathfrak{p}_r, \mathfrak{p}_	heta, \mathfrak{p}_\phi)$ . Consider the "reduced" 4-velocity $	ilde{\mathbf{p}}_a^{	ext{red}} = (0, 0, \mathfrak{r}\mathfrak{p}_	heta, \mathfrak{r}\mathfrak{p}_\phi)$ whose construction from $	ilde{\mathbf{p}}_a$ (e.g. by projection) is independent of $	heta$ and $\phi$ . Now when the motion is equatorial $\mathfrak{p}_	heta = 0$ and $	heta = \pi/2$ we have
$$
L^{2} = g^{\alpha  eta} 	ilde {p}_{\alpha}^{	ext {r e d}} 	ilde {p}_{ eta}^{	ext {r e d}} = g^{\phi \phi} r^{2} p_{\phi}^{2} = p_{\phi}^{2} = 	ext {c o n s e r v e d}.
$$
But in general
$$
\mathbf {L}^{2} = \mathbf {g}^{	heta 	heta} \mathbf {r}^{2} \mathbf {p}_{	heta}^{2} + \mathbf {g}^{\phi \phi} \mathbf {r}^{2} \mathbf {p}_{\phi}^{2} = \mathbf {p}_{	heta}^{2} +  rac {\mathbf {p}_{\phi}^{2}}{\sin^{2} 	heta}.
$$
So this must be conserved in general, q.e.d.
